THE BUG MUST NOT HISS BASEBALL PLAYERS |

SOME INTERESTING ENGAGEMENTS


AHEAD FOR SPOKANE INDIANS

pages.raw_text:
now declared to be in practically
as good condition as they will be
at most any time during the sea-
son.


Another game with the Con-
zaga college boys will be played by
the Indians Saturday afternoon and
the Hazlewoods of the City league
will try their luck against this pro-
fessional team Sunday afternoon.


One coming game that is attract
ing great amount of attention by
Indian followers is that of Friday
afternoon at Recreation park with
the Oregon Agricultural college
nine. Oregon fans seem to think
that college team is made up of
the real live material that is re-
quired of good ball players and
they intimate that the Indians will
be YEARLY searching for the pei
let before the game is over.
